items.line_en: Around the world every day, thousands of not millions of people give presentations.

coach.say: Around the world every day, thousands of not millions of people give presentations.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Around the world every day, / thousands of not millions of people give presentations.

items.line_en: Some are great, and have a powerful impact on their audiences.

coach.say: Some are great, and have a powerful impact on their audiences.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Some are great, / and have a powerful impact on their audiences.

items.line_en: Others.

coach.say: Others.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Others.

items.line_en: Well, let's just say there works in progress.

coach.say: Well, let's just say there works in progress.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / let's just say there works in progress.

items.line_en: This is powerful presentations, simply stated.

coach.say: This is powerful presentations, simply stated.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is powerful presentations, / simply stated.

items.line_en: Meet Jim, an aspiring professional, trying to make it in the world.

coach.say: Meet Jim, an aspiring professional, trying to make it in the world.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Meet Jim, / an aspiring professional, / trying to make it in the world.

items.line_en: Jim used to give presentations, like just about everyone else you knew.

coach.say: Jim used to give presentations, like just about everyone else you knew.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Jim used to give presentations, / like just about everyone else you knew.

items.line_en: PowerPoint was his tool of choice.

coach.say: PowerPoint was his tool of choice.
coach.hint: Chunk it: PowerPoint was his tool of choice.

items.line_en: He'd use it like an outline, with a header, followed by bullet after bullet, and sometimes

coach.say: He'd use it like an outline, with a header, followed by bullet after bullet, and sometimes
coach.hint: Chunk it: He'd use it like an outline, / with a header, / followed by bullet after bullet, / and sometimes

items.line_en: even sub-bullets.

coach.say: even sub-bullets.
coach.hint: Chunk it: even sub-bullets.

items.line_en: When he wanted to be fancy, he'd add what usually turned out to be an ineffective chart,

coach.say: When he wanted to be fancy, he'd add what usually turned out to be an ineffective chart,
coach.hint: Chunk it: When he wanted to be fancy, / he'd add what usually turned out to be an ineffective chart,

items.line_en: or sometimes a table, and when Jim wanted to really spice things up, he'd add, yep, clip

coach.hint: Chunk it: or sometimes a table, and when Jim wanted to really spice things up, / he'd add, yep, clip

items.line_en: art.

coach.say: art.
coach.hint: Chunk it: art.

items.line_en: Unfortunately, Jim's approach would often confuse and bore people.

coach.say: Unfortunately, Jim's approach would often confuse and bore people.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Unfortunately, / Jim's approach would often confuse and bore people.

items.line_en: This was a problem because he had important things to say, and because it was dimming

coach.say: This was a problem because he had important things to say, and because it was dimming
coach.hint: Chunk it: This was a problem because he had important things to say, / and because it was dimming

items.line_en: his prospects for success.

coach.say: his prospects for success.
coach.hint: Chunk it: his prospects for success.

items.line_en: Fortunately, Jim learned a better way, and didn't stay in the dark for long.

coach.say: Fortunately, Jim learned a better way, and didn't stay in the dark for long.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Fortunately, / Jim learned a better way, / and didn't stay in the dark for long.

items.line_en: Perhaps most importantly, he now focuses on the story he wants to tell.

coach.say: Perhaps most importantly, he now focuses on the story he wants to tell.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perhaps most importantly, / he now focuses on the story he wants to tell.

items.line_en: In doing so, he tries to follow a simple structure, with a clear beginning, middle, and

coach.say: In doing so, he tries to follow a simple structure, with a clear beginning, middle, and
coach.hint: Chunk it: In doing so, he tries to follow a simple structure, / with a clear beginning, middle, and

items.line_en: end, that links together his various points, and builds to his conclusion.

coach.say: end, that links together his various points, and builds to his conclusion.
coach.hint: Chunk it: end, / that links together his various points, / and builds to his conclusion.

items.line_en: When formulating his story, Jim uses a simple pad of paper or sticky notes, staying low

coach.hint: Chunk it: When formulating his story, / Jim uses a simple pad of paper or sticky notes, / staying low

items.line_en: tech at this stage, how some think more creatively, and stay outside the box.

items.line_en: He then considers what will best help him tell his story.

coach.hint: Chunk it: He then considers what will best help him tell his story.

items.line_en: Jim sometimes opts to use a whiteboard, flip charts, handouts, or even no props at all.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Jim sometimes opts to use a whiteboard, / flip charts, / handouts, / or even no props at all.

coach.hint: Chunk it: When it makes sense for him to use PowerPoint, / he tries to remember the adage that sometimes

items.line_en: less is more.

coach.say: less is more.
coach.hint: Chunk it: less is more.

coach.say: He doesn't dumb down his presentations, but he does try to limit each slide to one key
coach.hint: Chunk it: He doesn't dumb down his presentations, / but he does try to limit each slide to one key

items.line_en: idea, or, depending on the content, he sometimes builds an idea incrementally, so it's

items.line_en: easy to follow.

coach.hint: Chunk it: easy to follow.

coach.hint: Chunk it: He always looks for visual ways to tell his story, / with supporting images, / minimal text,

coach.hint: Chunk it: Sometimes he uses quotes, / but he tries to remember that people can't read his slides,

items.line_en: and truly listen at the same time.

items.line_en: it in his notes that only he sees.

items.line_en: Jim's new approach takes more time, energy, and rehearsal.

coach.say: Jim's new approach takes more time, energy, and rehearsal.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Jim's new approach takes more time, / energy, / and rehearsal.

items.line_en: This has been well worth the effort.

coach.say: This has been well worth the effort.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This has been well worth the effort.

items.line_en: His audiences are now much more engaged, and better understand to remember his presentations.

coach.hint: Chunk it: His audiences are now much more engaged, / and better understand to remember his presentations.

items.line_en: And as if that weren't enough, his pocketbook doesn't mind either.
